hint.primary-with-stake: Owns {{stake}}%  of the business & submitted the business information

stake-explanation.title: User’s explanation for why the ownership percentages don’t add up

kind-form.warning: This business has an incomplete onboarding. Requesting a document from them will prevent the business from completing their onboarding

upload-doc.label: Ask beneficial owner to upload a document
upload-doc.instructions: Select a beneficial owner who will receive a link to upload a document on behalf of the business. Only the beneficial owner you select here will be able to upload the requested document.

add-bo.label: Request additional beneficial owners
add-bo.hint: A beneficial owner is anyone who has substantial control of or owns at least 25% of the business.
add-bo.instructions: Select a beneficial owner who will receive a link to fill out the additional beneficial owner information. Only the beneficial owner you select here will be able to complete the form.

note.label: Note for the beneficial owner (optional)
note.placeholder: Please provide information about any additional beneficial owners who have substantial control or own at least 25% of the business...

name.label: Document name
name.tooltip: Specify a clear name for the document to help users understand what kind of document to upload.

identifier.label: Identifier
identifier.tooltip: Use this string to retrieve the document from the vault.

error.invalid: Identifier can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

note.label: Note for the beneficial owner (optional)
note.placeholder: We'd need you to check if there's a typo in the address information you provided...

confirmation.title: Link generated!
confirmation.description: Share this link with the beneficial owner. They will be asked to login and securely provide the requested information
confirmation.expiration: Link will automatically expire in {{duration}} day(s)

sent.description: Link was sent to the beneficial owner
